monster.name: Zombie

trait.name: Undead Fortitude (1/Day)
entries: If the zombie is reduced to 0 hit points by damage that isn't radiant or from a critical hit, it's instead reduced to 1 hit point, falls {@condition prone}, and is {@condition incapacitated} until the end of its next turn, appearing to be dead.

trait.name: Undead Nature
entries: A zombie doesn't require air, sustenance, or sleep.

action.name: Grab
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one target. {@damage 1d6 + 1} bludgeoning damage. If the target is a Medium or smaller creature, it is {@condition grappled}. Until the grapple ends, the zombie can't grab another target.

action.name: Bite
entries: {@atk mw} reach 5 ft., one {@condition grappled} target. {@damage 1d10 + 1} piercing damage, and the zombie regains the same number of hit points.

majorEffect: The zombie may immediately shift 5 feet.
